evals.blind_spot_short: overall agent quality outside bounded change tasks
evals.bounded_claim_short: under these conditions, the agent can produce a reviewable bounded change
evals.do_not_use_short: the main question is authority handling rather than artifact quality
evals.name: aoa-bounded-change-quality
evals.proof_artifact_short: fixture family, runner contract, and report schema
evals.summary: Checks the quality of a bounded repository change.
evals.use_when_short: the task is a bounded change and the question is output quality
evals.what_this_does_not_prove: proof that the overall workflow was perfect
